title: 16 Pack Pesticide Free Fly Paper Strips, Sticky Fly Catchers Set Fruit Trap Insect Sticky Trap for Indoors and Outdoors Use
bullet_points: Easy-to-use Fly Traps - a great non-toxic, insecticide-free solution for eliminating flying insect
No baiting, no vapors, no poison and therefore no mess.
Safe and Effective sticky paper, once they land, they never leave because of strong sticky-coating on paper
Just 3 Steps to get rid of nasty flies: Gently rotate and pull it - Hang the ribbon by placing the thumbtack through the red loop - Remove it when full.

Sticky on both sides, catches flying pests like gnats, flies and mosquitoes, and better put it in the barns, stables, kennels, porches, garages or food preparation areas. If a product is suspended for more than 2-3 weeks, it can be replaced with a new one.
